introduction: Each party below lists where its numbers should come from. Status reflects what is typically loaded into this repo today — update rows as you add snapshots under public/data/snapshots/.

parties.role: Legacy shell: GSTIN, HDFC bank, Tally; winding down; GSTR-2B = inward (purchases).

sources.label: HDFC bank statements (tagged master CSV)
sources.covers: Rent to Harshad, advance tax payments, OD interest debits, STPL ↔ SW flows

sources.label: Tally purchase & sales registers (tagged)
sources.typical_path: ORIGINALS/Space WIthin Tally Purchase and Sale/
sources.covers: Legacy books; overlap risk with ECPL era — use dates + tags

parties.role: Current company; printed sales = source of truth vs Tally when they differ.

sources.label: Tally purchase & sales (tagged)
sources.covers: Purchases through ~Feb 26 export; sales through Jan 26 export

sources.label: Axis current account (FY 25–26 from PDF → CSV)
sources.covers: ECPL receipts/payments incl. GST, NEFT to Harshad, STPL credits

parties.role: Lender / counterparty; NEFTs to ECPL and SW per bank narrations (no formal intercompany policy doc).

sources.label: Inflows to ECPL tagged “SIGN TECHNIC” (ECPL Axis)
STPL ↔ Space Within (HDFC narrations)
sources.covers: Loans, returns, ECPL-tagged outflows from SW

parties.role: Reimbursement / card / savings tagging for company-like spend.
Rent accrual 01-10-2024 to 31-03-2026 @ ₹1,00,000/month; any direct payment after 1 Oct 2024 = rent.

sources.label: NEFT to NAKUL HARSHAD MEHTA (ECPL Axis)
sources.covers: Part of rent paid from ECPL

sources.label: Payments on Space Within HDFC (to be tagged)

reconciliation_principles: Printed ECPL sales total overrides Tally sales when they differ.
GSTR-2B / 2A style data = inward (purchases), not outward sales.
For Oct 2024 – Mar 2026, treat Space Within OD interest charged by the bank as the amount to make good when allocating to ECPL (per your narrative).
Intercompany: no direct SW ↔ ECPL transfers in the model — only via banks and STPL as actually seen in statements.
Harshad income tax: 30% × Space Within profit — needs SW profit from books/CA; identify payments by challan/narration.
